title: On the existence of ad-nilpotent elements
author_string: Benkart, G. M., Isaacs, I. M.
journal: Proceedings of the American Mathematical Society
abstract: A condition sufficient to guarantee the nilpotence of a derivation of a Lie algebra is given. It is used to obtain an elementary proof that a finite dimensional Lie algebra over an algebraically closed field of arbitrary characteristic necessarily contains an ad-nilpotent element.
